ddls:
CREATE TABLE "areas" (
  "area_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the area */,
  "area_name" TEXT /* Name of the area */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region in which the area is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the area */,
  "city" TEXT /* City name */,
  "postcode" TEXT /* Postcode */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("area_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "area_type" TEXT /* Type of area (e.g., overview) */,
  "area_name" TEXT /* Name of the area (e.g., United Kingdom) */,
  "area_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the area */,
  "city" TEXT /* City name */,
  "postcode" TEXT /* Postcode */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the data entry */,
  "covid_occupied_mvb_beds" INTEGER /* Number of occupied Mobile Ventilation Bays for COVID-19 patients */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_data_area_code FOREIGN KEY ("area_code") REFERENCES areas ("area_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "hospital_data" (
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hospital */,
  "area_code" TEXT /* Code of the area in which the hospital is located */,
  "city" TEXT /* City name */,
  "postcode" TEXT /* Postcode */,
  "hospital_name" TEXT /* Name of the hospital */,
  "hospital_type" TEXT /* Type of hospital */,
  "total_beds" INTEGER /* Total number of beds in the hospital */,
  "occupied_beds" INTEGER /* Number of currently occupied beds */,
  "covid_patients" INTEGER /* Number of COVID-19 patients in the hospital */,
  "icu_beds" INTEGER /* Number of ICU beds */,
  "ventilator_capacity" INTEGER /* Total ventilator capacity */,
  "ventilators_available" INTEGER /* Number of available ventilators */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hospital_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hospital_data_area_code FOREIGN KEY ("area_code") REFERENCES areas ("area_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "medical_resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource entry */,
  "area_code" TEXT /* Code of the area where the resources are located */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of medical resource (e.g., PPE, ventilators) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the resource available */,
  "resource_condition" TEXT /* Condition of the resource */,
  "supplier" TEXT /* Supplier information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medical_resources_area_code FOREIGN KEY ("area_code") REFERENCES areas ("area_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_data" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hospital where the patient is admitted */,
  "date_admitted" TEXT /* Date when the patient was admitted */,
  "date_discharged" TEXT /* Date when the patient was discharged */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the patient (e.g., recovering, deceased) */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the patient */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the patient */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the patient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_data_hospital_id FOREIGN KEY ("hospital_id") REFERENCES hospital_data ("hospital_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "staff_data" (
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each staff member */,
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hospital where the staff member works */,
  "staff_name" TEXT /* Full name of the staff member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the staff member */,
  "availability" TEXT /* Current availability status of the staff member */,
  "staff_specialty" TEXT /* Specialty of the staff member */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Years of experience of the staff member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_staff_data_hospital_id FOREIGN KEY ("hospital_id") REFERENCES hospital_data ("hospital_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "covid_scenarios" (
  "scenario_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scenario */,
  "area_code" TEXT /* Code of the area for which the scenario is created */,
  "date_created" TEXT /* Date when the scenario was created */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date for which the prediction is made */,
  "predicted_occupancy" INTEGER /* Predicted number of occupied beds */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the scenario */,
  "scenario_type" TEXT /* Type of scenario */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the scenario */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scenario_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_covid_scenarios_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, data analyst) */,
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hospital associated with the user, if applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_hospital_id FOREIGN KEY ("hospital_id") REFERENCES hospital_data ("hospital_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the health data being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download, update) */,
  "access_reason" TEXT /* Reason for accessing the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES health_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version of the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the health data */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the data */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was updated */,
  "update_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the update */,
  "data_status" TEXT /* Status of the data */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who updated the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES health_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "area_code" TEXT /* Code of the area for which the alert is issued */,
  "date_issued" TEXT /* Date when the alert was issued */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message content of the alert */,
  "severity_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "alert_category" TEXT /* Category of the alert */,
  "sent_to" TEXT /* Recipients of the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_area_code FOREIGN KEY ("area_code") REFERENCES areas ("area_code")
)
